title: onobrychis major
intro: Onobrychis major, also known as Persian clover or common bird's foot trefoil, is a perennial herbaceous legume plant native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Onobrychis major include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions such as arthritis and digestive disorders. Onobrychis major is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
